case_title: DANA BEN-TZUR VS. ELI MAY et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $194.44 FILED BY BEN-TZUR, DANA AS TO DEFENDANT MAY, ELI TSCHIDA, BRIAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2013 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
